objective: Objectif: Sur le token GIGGLEUSDC et le timeframe 4h, en utilisant les indicateurs adx + aroon + atr + ichimoku + ema, nous voulons appliquer un filtre de volatility implicite/realisee (mode_counter_consensus) avec une confirmation contrarienne partielle (mode_microstructure). Nous étudierons ensuite les comportements aleatoires imposés par la session/horaire et l'liquideité (mode_counter_consensus), tout en respectant les conditions de risk management SL / TP. Entrées : adx + aroon + atr + ichimoku + ema; Sorties : hypothèse testable et falsifiable; Conditions : volatility implicite/realisee (mode_counter_consensus) avec confirmation contrarienne partielle (mode_microstructure). Risk management: SL / TP. Réponse complète de l'assistant AI: Objet: Générer un objectif de stratégie de trading original et précis en utilisant les placeholders `GIGGLEUSDC` et `4h`. Utilisez exactement ces indicateurs pour votre stratégie : adx + aroon + atr + ichimoku + ema. Étudiez également

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of ADR and ATR alerts with AUDCO trend enhances trade opportunities in the 4h GIGGLEUSDC timeframe.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on four indicators which are adx, ATR and ichimoku cloud. The use of atr with audco trend enhances trade opportunities in the 4h GIGGLEUSDC timeframe. The combination of these indicators aims to identify trends in the market and set entry and exit points for trades. However, this strategy is highly dependent on historical data which might not reflect future performance.
[Backup plan] 1) In case the backtest results are poor (negative return), one potential change would be to modify the signals used for entering or exiting a trade such as adjusting the atr level or adx values. 2) If results are mediocre, then we could try tweaking some of the parameters like increasing the amount risked per trade or decreasing the stop loss size to increase our potential reward/risk ratio.3) In case this strategy fails, an alternative approach that can be considered is using a different set of indicators that are more robust and less dependent on historical data such as RSI, Bollinger Bands etc.
